chunks.text: Project NoScope | EECS at UC Berkeley Project NoScope Mark Hardiman and Ying Ou and Ryan Frazier and Zeyi Lee and Longxiang Cui EECS Department, University of California, Berkeley Technical Report No. UCB/EECS-2015-51 May 9, 2015 http://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/Pubs/TechRpts/2015/EECS-2015-51.pdf This project report covers the development of a computational 3D microscope, NoScope. Using tomographic and light field algorithms, we present a method to reconstruct 3D volumes of microscopic samples taken with a lensless sensor. Business and intellectual property strategies for commercializing NoScope are detailed in the first three sections. The remaining sections highlight the projectâs technical accomplishments and methods.
